body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule L 2025 business income.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.L-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule L line relationships encoded from the official schedule:
Line 22 is net income from business other than the types separately listed. Line 23 is net farming income. Line 24 is net fishing income. Line 25 is net professional income. Line 26 is net income from work remunerated on a commission basis. Line 26.1 is net cryptoasset business income from form TP-21.4.39-V or RL-15 box 1-12 for a partnership member. Line 27 adds lines 22 through 26.1. Line 28 enters income from a partnership allocated to a retiring partner or end-of-career allowance received by a physician who did not practise medicine in the year the allowance was received. Line 29 enters income from a partnership of which the taxpayer was a specified member. Line 30 enters commissions received from a business in the years following the end of its operations. Line 34 adds lines 27 through 30 and carries net business income to TP-1 line 164. Line 40 enters insurable earnings for QPIP and pensionable earnings for QPP of a person responsible for a family-type resource or an intermediate resource from line 8 of form LM-53-V.
